office_does: The assessor values taxable property, administers exemptions, and maintains assessment records.
race_blurb: Incumbent Dan Lindgren faces challenger Josh Nuxoll.

candidates.summary: Lindgren is the incumbent assessor and emphasizes service improvements and politically neutral valuations.

experience.basis: Incumbency provides an established assessor record.

candidates.summary: Nuxoll is a filed candidate whose dossier contains no identity-safe biography or platform.
